name: China Environmental Resources Group Limited
summary: China Environmental Resources Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the distribution and trading of motor vehicles and accessories in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It is also involved in metal recycle; car parking spaces rental; and money lending businesses. In addition, the company engages in the research, development, and application of technology solutions, as well as the manufacture, sale, and trading of products, materials, systems, and services for the environmental, agricultural, organic, and green technology markets; securities trading and investment; and property investment. Further, it sells golden flower tea products; and plantation materials and products, as well as provides financial services. The company was formerly known as Benefun International Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Environmental Resources Group Limited in December 2009. China Environmental Resources Group Limited was founded in 1986 and is based in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
